steps.t: Herne is located north-west of Tharbad, along the Old South Road. Meneldir told you that when he last came this way, the inn at the cross-road was a p…
Something is not right in the town of Herne. Perhaps one of the residents of the town can explain what has happened.
Something is not right in the town of Herne. Perhaps one of the residents of the town can explain what has happened.
Crossway House, the inn at the cross-road, is near the southern road that passes through Herne. Something happened at Herne that has upset the townspe…
Maddoc, the innkeeper of Crossway House, stands behind the counter.
Maddoc, the innkeeper of Crossway House, stands behind the counter.
Aberthol lives in the northern part of Herne. Maddoc told you something happened to Aberthol four nights ago, and the old man may speak to you about i…
A mug of spiced beer, set on his table, may encourage Aberthol to tell you what happened to him.
Aberthol is inside his home, considering you, your companions, and the mug of spiced beer you brought him.
Aberthol waits for you to introduce him to your companions.
Aberthol, apparently awestruck by his visitors, is now willing to tell you his story.
